seo.title: Resoria — Restaurant & Inventory Software | Easy Restaurant & Mi Inventario
seo.description: Resoria builds simple software for restaurants and inventory management. Choose a lifetime license or monthly SaaS subscription. Easy Restaurant & Mi Inventario.
seo.ogImageAlt: Resoria Software Solutions — Easy Restaurant and Mi Inventario

hero.subheadline: Resoria is a software company that simplifies how you run your business.

productsSection.title: Our products and pricing
productsSection.subtitle: Choose the software you need and the plan that fits your business best.

products.name: Easy Restaurant
products.description: Manage tables, orders, kitchen, and cash register from one system. Ideal for restaurants, cafés, and food trucks.
products.logoAlt: Easy Restaurant logo — restaurant management software

products.name: Mi Inventario
products.description: Manage products, stock in/out, and low-stock alerts. Perfect for shops, warehouses, and stores.
products.logoAlt: Mi Inventario logo — inventory management software

compareSection.title: Lifetime license or SaaS?
compareSection.subtitle: Compare both options and pick the one that fits your business.

rows.lifetime: Businesses that prefer fixed long-term cost

stories.title: La Esquina Restaurant
stories.quote: With Easy Restaurant we reduced order errors and service is much faster.
stories.author: María G., restaurant owner

stories.title: El Ahorro Store
stories.quote: Mi Inventario helped us know exactly which products to restock every week.
stories.author: Carlos R., store manager

stories.title: Café Central
stories.quote: The SaaS plan let us start without a big upfront investment. Highly recommended.

contactSection.title: How to buy
contactSection.subtitle: Three simple steps to get your license.

steps.title: 1. Choose
steps.description: Select the product and plan (lifetime or SaaS) that works for you.

steps.title: 2. Contact us
steps.description: Fill out the form or reach out directly. We reply within 24 hours.

steps.title: 3. Pay
steps.description: Pay via PayPal, bank transfer, or cash. We activate your license upon confirmation.

paymentMethods.name: PayPal
paymentMethods.description: Secure payment with your PayPal account. We send you the link after confirming your order.

paymentMethods.name: Bank transfer
paymentMethods.description: Direct transfer to our account. We send bank details by email.

paymentMethods.name: Cash
paymentMethods.description: Cash payment available depending on your location. Contact us to coordinate.

footer.tagline: Software Solutions — Easy Restaurant & Mi Inventario
